ques: Identify the size and weight for the Apple TV 4K and list the Siri Remote features introduced.
answer: Apple TV 4K size/weight — Height 1.2 in (31 mm), Width 3.66 in (93 mm), Depth 3.66 in (93 mm); Weight 7.3 oz (208 g) Wi-Fi model / 7.5 oz (214 g) Wi-Fi+Ethernet model. Siri Remote features: Bluetooth 5.0 wireless technology, IR transmitter, USB-C connector for charging, rechargeable battery (months of life per charge), charging via USB-C cable, and TV/receiver control via IR or CEC; buttons include Microphone for Siri, Touch-enabled clickpad, Back, Play/Pause, Mute, Power, Siri, TV/Home, Volume, and USB-C.
